title: AN ACT TO GRANT FILIPINO CITIZENSHIP TO REV. FR. PAUL VAN PARIJS, CICM

chunks.text:
H. No. 3287 / 93 OG No. 18, 2772 (May 5, 1997)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8266, February 20, 1997 ]

AN ACT TO GRANT FILIPINO CITIZENSHIP TO REV. FR. PAUL VAN PARIJS, CICM

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Rev. Fr. Paul Van Parijs, a Belgian citizen and a Roman Catholic Priest of the Congregation of the Immaculate Heart of Mary (CICM), is hereby granted Filipino citizenship:

Provided

, that he subscribe to the appropriate oath of allegiance as a Filipino citizen.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, February 20, 1997.
